design_philosophy.vibe: Cinematic, Precise, Authoritative. Think 'The Batman's Batcomputer' meets 'NASA Mission Control'.

theme.instructions: The app must be permanently in dark mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The users are in a dim control room.

usage_rules.accent_usage: Use Neon Green/Amber/Red ONLY for status indicators and alerts. Do not use them for decoration.

structure.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-full z-50 hidden md:flex flex-col border-r border-zinc-800 bg-black
structure.header: h-16 border-b border-zinc-800 flex items-center px-6 bg-[#09090b]/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-40

cards.classes: bg-zinc-950/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-medium rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wide text-xs px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white border border-zinc-700 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wide text-xs px-4 py-2
buttons.destructive: bg-red-900/20 text-red-400 border border-red-900/50 hover:bg-red-900/40 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wide text-xs

badges.live: animate-pulse bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase
badges.status_ok: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-500 border border-emerald-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase

inputs.style: bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 rounded-sm

visual_enhancers.gradients: NONE. Use solid colors and semi-transparent overlays.
visual_enhancers.patterns: Optional: Subtle scanline overlay on video feeds (repeating-linear-gradient)

incidents.layout: Table with filterable columns and quick actions

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid dark colors.
Text must always be readable. Contrast ratio > 4.5:1.
Animations should be minimal and functional (e.g., blinking red dot for live status).
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to maintain the industrial look.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all numerical data points.
Map containers must have a 'relative' class and 'z-0' to avoid overlay issues.
Video feeds should have a 'LIVE' badge in the top-right corner.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a mission-critical traffic control dashboard. The aesthetic is 'Dark Ops'. Prioritize performance and data visibility. Use the provided image URLs for the prototype video feeds and map backgrounds. The sidebar should be collapsible. Use Shadcn UI components but override their styles to match the 'flat, dark, bordered' aesthetic defined in 'components' section. Do not use rounded-xl or large radii; stick to rounded-sm or rounded-md.
